name: Chicken, Wild Rice and Pecan Salad in Romaine Spears
recipeInstructions:
For the chicken:
- Roast, skin, and bone chicken. Cut into 1-inch pieces.
Cooking the wild rice:
- Bring broth to a boil in a medium saucepan.
- Add rice and bring to a boil.
- Reduce heat to low, cover, and cook until just tender, about 50 minutes.
- Drain well.
Preparing the salad:
- Transfer the rice to a large bowl. Mix in chicken, bell pepper, arugula, and green onions.
- In a small bowl, mix soy sauce, vinegar, and oil.
- Pour the dressing over the salad and mix to coat. Season with salt and pepper.
- (Can be made up to 4 hours ahead. Cover and chill.)
- Mix nuts into the salad.
Plating:
- Place the salad in the center of the platter.
- Reserve outer romaine leaves for another use.
- Arrange inner leaves on the platter around the salad.
